prayer.title: Prayer Request
prayer.description: A prayer request submitted by users to be read in holy lands.

senderName.description: Name of the sender, defaults to 'Hamba Allah'

isRead.description: Determines whether the prayer has been read by the admin

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the prayer was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the prayer was last updated

prayers/{prayerId}.description: Collection of all submitted prayer requests
